language.string: The Hungarians bring the cavalry traditions of the Magyar people to the battlefield.
Hungarian infantry with a strong melee charge and bonus damage against skirmishers and heavy infantry. Does not gain rank promotions.
Hungarian line infantry armed with a needle gun. Good against cavalry and other infantry.
Upgrades Honvéds to Veteran (+20% hitpoints and attack, +0.10 speed).
Upgrades Honvéds to Guard (+20% hitpoints and attack, +0.10 speed).
Upgrades Honvéds to Imperial (+50% hitpoints and attack, +0.10 speed).
Upgrades Hajduks to Veteran (+20% hitpoints and attack, +0.10 speed).
Upgrades Hajduks to Guard (+20% hitpoints and attack, +0.10 speed).
Upgrades Hajduks to Imperial (+50% hitpoints and attack, +0.10 speed).
Elite Hungarian shock cavalry, powerful in melee.
Croatian cavalry: ranged attack strong vs cavalry (x3) and artillery (x2); melee strong vs infantry (x3).
Upgrades Magyar Hussars to Guard (+20% hitpoints and attack).
Upgrades Magyar Hussars to Imperial (+50% hitpoints and attack).
Upgrades Crabats to Guard (+20% hitpoints and attack).
Upgrades Crabats to Imperial (+50% hitpoints and attack).
The old obligation of the Hungarian nobility to provide cavalry allows a larger number of Magyar Hussars to be kept on the battlefield. Effect: Magyar Hussars now cost 2 population instead of 3.
